title: Rule-Obj-ServiceLevel
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Service Level Agreement rule (Rule-Obj-ServiceLevel). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted.

pyClassName.description: Target class the SLA applies to (e.g., work class).

pyRuleName.description: Rule name (PascalCase, no spaces). Must match pyServiceLevelName.

pyServiceLevelName.description: Internal SLA name — the class key for this rule.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset name the rule is saved into.

pyCalculateTimesFrom.description: How SLA intervals are measured. 'ASSIGNSTART' = fixed interval from when assignment is ready (most common). 'PROPERTY' = 'Set to the value of a property' mode — goal/deadline/late times come from DateTime properties (set pyGoalTimeProperty, pyDeadlineTimeProperty).

pyNextActionSetting.description: Assignment ready timing. 'Immediate' = ready as soon as created. 'Calculate' = ready after a fixed delay (set pyNextActionDays/Hours/Minutes/Seconds). 'Property' = ready time read from a DateTime property (set pyNextActionProperty).

pyNextActionDays.description: Timed delay — days. Used when pyNextActionSetting is 'Calculate'.

pyNextActionHours.description: Timed delay — hours. Used when pyNextActionSetting is 'Calculate'.

pyNextActionMinutes.description: Timed delay — minutes. Used when pyNextActionSetting is 'Calculate'.

pyNextActionSeconds.description: Timed delay — seconds. Used when pyNextActionSetting is 'Calculate'.

pyNextActionProperty.description: DateTime property reference for dynamic assignment ready time. Used when pyNextActionSetting is 'Property'. Must start with a dot, e.g. '.pxCreateDateTime'.

pyUrgencySLA.description: Initial urgency value when the SLA starts.

pyMaxLateEvents.description: Maximum number of Passed Deadline (Late) escalation events.

pyCalendar.description: Calendar rule name for business-day calculations. Blank = calendar days.

pyGoalTimeProperty.description: DateTime property for dynamic goal time. Used when pyCalculateTimesFrom is 'PROPERTY'. MUST reference an existing DateTime property on pyClassName (e.g. '.pxCreateDateTime'). Do NOT invent property names — list properties first to verify.

pyDeadlineTimeProperty.description: DateTime property for dynamic deadline time. Used when pyCalculateTimesFrom is 'PROPERTY'. MUST reference an existing DateTime property on pyClassName (e.g. '.pxUpdateDateTime'). Do NOT invent property names — list properties first to verify.

pyEscalations.description: PageGroup with three fixed keys: Goal, Deadline, Late. Each defines escalation interval, urgency bump, and actions.

SLEscalation.description: Escalation tier — defines interval, urgency increase, and actions.

pyDays.description: Interval — days. Must match top-level counterpart.

pyHours.description: Interval — hours. Must match top-level counterpart.

pyMinutes.description: Interval — minutes. Must match top-level counterpart.

pySeconds.description: Interval — seconds. Must match top-level counterpart.

pyEscalationActions.description: Actions to execute when the escalation fires.

EscalationAction.description: Action to run at escalation time.

pyActionSelect.description: Action type. Maps to UI: Apply Data Transform, Call Flow, Advance Flow, Notify Assignee, Notify Manager, Notify Party, Transfer, Run Activity.

pyStepActionSelect.description: Internal action type — must match pyActionSelect.

pyActivityToRun.description: Activity name to run when pyActionSelect is 'CallActivity' (e.g., 'pxPostMessage').

pyRuleNameProperty.description: Property reference for the activity name. Set to '.pyActivityToRun' when using CallActivity.

pyActivity.description: Activity name — auto-set by Pega for notify actions. For CallActivity, use pyActivityToRun instead.

pyResumeFlowAction.description: Flow action name to advance to when pyActionSelect is 'AdvanceFlow'. Required — Pega validates this field is not blank.

pyCallFlowType.description: Flow name to call when pyActionSelect is 'CallFlow'. Pega auto-sets pyActivity to 'startFlow'.

pyDataTransform.description: Data transform name when pyActionSelect is 'DataTransform'. Note: value may not persist via API — UI save recommended.

pyActionWhen.description: When rule to gate the action.

pyCorrName.description: Correspondence rule name for NotifyParty. Required when pyActionSelect is 'NotifyParty' — Pega validates this field is not blank.

pyPartyRole.description: Work party role to notify when pyActionSelect is 'NotifyParty'. Required — Pega validates this field is not blank. Common values: 'Customer', 'Interested'.

pyCorrForSendEmail.description: Correspondence rule for email notifications (used by NotifyAssignee, NotifyManager).

pySubject.description: Email subject line for notification actions.

pyRunActivityParams.description: Activity parameter map — keys are parameter names, values are strings. Required when the activity needs parameters (e.g., pxPostMessage requires 'Message' and 'Verb').
